label: AI Insight UI — Data Sources
info: Exposes GET /api/v1/data-sources which synthesises an observable list of FACIS data sources from the simulation engine's last-known feed state (global.latest_meters / latest_pv / latest_weather / latest_price / latest_consumers) plus static rows for non-simulation channels (SFTP, MQTT, Modbus). Empty entries indicate the simulation has never produced a sample for that feed.

name: build data-sources response
